label: baseline

card.title: deepEqual() structural comparison helper
card.description: Compare two values structurally for the memoization layer.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed. Handle primitives, arrays, plain objects. Document that it does NOT handle Map/Set/Date. Tested.
isc: Exports deepEqual(a, b) returning a boolean for structural equality
Compares arrays element-wise and plain objects key-wise
Documents the unsupported types (Map/Set/Date) it does not handle
Tests cover nested objects, arrays, and primitive mismatches

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports deepEqual(a, b) returning a boolean for structural equality
